text_block_list.text:
After school, Mayano Top Gun catches Hishi
Amazon running along the riverside and strikes up
a conversation with her.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Mayano. I'm just doing some running to
keep in shape.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Wait, for who? For your trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: What does my trainer have to do with it?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Y'know, 'cause people wanna impress the ones
they like. Ooh, you're so mature!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, I couldn't care less about that. I'm just trying
to slim down a bit for my next race.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to hide it, it's nothing to be
embarrassed about. ☆ Gosh, I can't wait until I
grow up and fall in love someday!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: What are you going on about? Well, whatever.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, but I've gotta get back to running. I've only
gone to the bridge and back twice now.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yup! And I've still got ten more laps to go! All
right, time to blast right through this!

After an intense workout, Hishi Amazon returns to
her ideal racing weight.
